item.title: NVIDIA Spectrum-6 Ethernet Switch Arrives to Connect Gigascale AI Factories
item.summary: NVIDIA's Spectrum-6, a 102.4 Tb/s Ethernet switch doubling previous capacity, begins shipping to gigascale AI factories operated by CoreWeave, Microsoft, Nebius, SpaceXAI, and Tesla as part of the Vera Rubin platform, targeting frontier model training and agentic AI workloads.
